title: In need of dashboard and report that mimic this excel view:
excerpt:
Hello! I’m in need to develop a dashboard and report that mimic this excel format: 
any suggestions would be super helpful–thank you! 
Tiffany

posts.author: tfranchitto (Tiffany L)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I’m in need to develop a dashboard and report that mimic this excel format:

any suggestions would be super helpful–thank you!
Tiffany

image1534×416 13.6 KB

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tiffany!

My first suggestion would be to upload that Excel sheet directly into monday as a board and then add a Dashboard View to your board so you can choose what widgets you want to use to display that data visually, as you have done here.

I would suggest the Calendar Widget or the Gantt Widget.

I hope this is helpful! Let me know your thoughts and we can go from there!

posts.author: tfranchitto (Tiffany L)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Charlotte,

Thank you for responding but unfortunately that isn’t giving me the view that I need.

Thanks again,
Tiffany

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @tfranchitto ,
If you’re open to using apps, there’s Smart Spreadsheet for monday that automatically imports your board into a spreadsheet and lets you manage it as if your board is a table in a spreadsheet.
